headline: Will Carnival's New Princess Ships Strengthen Long-Term Growth?
summary: CCL is investing in new Princess ships and fleet upgrades as it focuses on long-term growth and stronger guest experiences.

headline: Oceania Cruises® Reveals Destination-Rich 2027 Specialty Cruises
summary: Oceania Cruises® announced its 2027 Specialty Cruises, bringing together destination‑rich itineraries and hosted experiences where cuisine, culture and personal connection take center stage.
